name: The Motherly Hyena
description:
Warnings this thing is from that weird fetish game "Changed" so it'll try to goop ya or vore dunno what it's called, didn't play the game, not my forte. Oh also while doing research or whatever it turns out that this thing isn't actually called Mother Yeen, as all evidence saying that it is, is just using "trust me bro"s as evidence and it was just spread so much it got taken as fact despite 0 real confirmation. So I made up a name to give her also yesh, is originally human (probably? as apparently the wiki for the game is incredibly inaccurate) Also these things are kinda cool ig so I might make more of these cuz reusable content and how non-specific the non-boss characters are, so yeah. Oh also if you want a better name for this like tell me, idk.

Btw this was a request:

Ermm.. also by my calculations (assuming the player character of the game is 5"10' as he is apparently 23 and also named Colin, which is a name that was/is popular in English speaking countries, most notably in 2005 in the US, meaning that around that time is the approximate time that the main character is likely to be born, meaning around 2028 or 2030 is when the game would be taking place which makes sense as it is seemingly set slightly In the future due to the infrastructure and culture stuff and the things shown in the game, and whatnot, so yeah) she is 11"6, and if suddenly there's an exact height for her given out by developer or whatever FINE I'LL CHANGE IT BUT ALSO HEADCANON SO IF YOU DISAGREE STFU

Important info or whatever:

She is 11"6, often very horny, is also very friendly :3 motherly, duh. Also she has a few adopted children (latex hyenas) and she MAY try to force you to be one too cuz the game. Also made of latex, duh you idiot. the appearance is based off of game sprites not the image used as that only happened late into development and I'm worn out, lazy, feel like an imposter and am just generally really down, so yeah I can't think of what else to add sorry, end--

So yeah I'm going Inactive now, for a while, whatever blah blah just go use the actually good stuff people make, honestly I should probably delete all my bots to not dilute the stuff over here.

So, the reason for the tags yeah dead dove because it CAN do stuff that makes that required also because weird fetish, fluff because, well, motherly character, smut cuz I mean.. ITS FROM A FETISH GAME and I mean it's not too hard to get it into smut in like the first message 🤷
